design_system.name: Nocturnal Navigator
design_system.description: A deep, bioluminescent aesthetic designed for travelers and night commuters. Uses high-contrast neon accents against a void-black background to ensure visibility without glare.

glassmorphism.base: backdrop-filter backdrop-blur-xl bg-slate-900/60 border border-white/10 shadow-2xl

map_style.note: Apply this CSS filter to the Leaflet tile layer to create a dark mode map without paid API keys.

animations.radar_spin: @keyframes radar-spin { from { transform: rotate(0deg); } to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

map_view.behavior: Full screen, user location tracking enabled
map_view.custom_marker: Use a divIcon with CSS pulsing effect for current location and alarm targets.

alarm_list.style: Glassmorphic cards floating over the map bottom or side drawer.
alarm_list.interaction: Swipe to delete, toggle switch for active state.

bottom_sheet.usage: Use for adding/editing alarms. Drag to dismiss.

fab.style: w-16 h-16 bg-primary text-primary-foreground rounded-full shadow-neon_glow flex items-center justify-center transition-transform hover:scale-105 active:scale-95

universal_guidelines: Do not use gradients for text or borders unless strictly necessary for the 'neon' effect.
Ensure all text on the map has a text-shadow for readability against variable backgrounds.
Use 'sonner' for all notifications (e.g., 'Alarm Set', 'Wake Up!').
The map tiles MUST be inverted using CSS filters to achieve the dark theme without API keys.
All interactive elements must have a minimum touch target of 44x44px.
Use 'data-testid' for all key interaction points.
instructions_to_main_agent: INSTALLATION: You MUST run 'yarn add leaflet react-leaflet @types/leaflet' immediately.
MAP FIX: Create a 'Map.css' file to handle the dark mode filter: `.leaflet-layer { filter: invert(100%) hue-rotate(180deg) brightness(95%) contrast(90%); }`.
PWA: Ensure the 'manifest.json' and service worker setup supports offline map usage if possible, or at least graceful degradation.
AUDIO: Use the HTML5 Audio API for the alarm sound. Preload a simple beep or alarm sound file.
